# CloudLedger Costs Domain API <sup>`v1.0.0`</sup>

`OpenAPI 3.0.3`

> The CloudLedger Costs domain — daily AWS spend the Cost Collector pulls from Cost
> Explorer, rolled up by service, account, and day. Read-only.
>
>   * /costs — costsapi (daily spend · service & account rollups)

## Servers

- `{scheme}://{host}:{port}` — costs (local)

## costs:daily

<details>
<summary>🟦 <code>GET</code> <code>/costs/daily</code> — List daily cost rows</summary>

Daily unblended + amortized spend. Filter by `account_id`, `service`, and a `from`/`to` date window (inclusive). Defaults to the last 30 days.

<sub>Operation ID: <code>costs_listDaily</code></sub>

**Parameters**

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `X-Api-Version`<br><sub>string · header</sub> | (default: `1`) |
| `page`<br><sub>integer (int32) · query</sub> | (default: `1`; min 1) |
| `page_size`<br><sub>integer (int32) · query</sub> | (default: `50`; min 1; max 200) |
| `account_id`<br><sub>integer (int64) · query</sub> | — |
| `service`<br><sub>string · query</sub> | Cost Explorer SERVICE dimension, e.g. 'Amazon EC2'. |
| `from`<br><sub>string (date) · query</sub> | — |
| `to`<br><sub>string (date) · query</sub> | — |

**Responses**

| Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 🟩 `200` | A page of daily cost rows. |
| 🟧 `401` | Missing or invalid bearer token. |

🟩 `200` response body:

<sub>Content-Type</sub> `application/json`

Schema: [CostDailyPage](#schema-costdailypage)

🟧 `401` response body:

<sub>Content-Type</sub> `application/json`

Schema: [Error](#schema-error)

</details>

## costs:rollups

<details>
<summary>🟦 <code>GET</code> <code>/costs/rollups/by-service</code> — Total spend grouped by service</summary>

Sums amortized spend by AWS service over the given date window.

<sub>Operation ID: <code>costs_rollupByService</code></sub>

**Parameters**

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `X-Api-Version`<br><sub>string · header</sub> | (default: `1`) |
| `from`<br><sub>string (date) · query</sub> | — |
| `to`<br><sub>string (date) · query</sub> | — |

**Responses**

| Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 🟩 `200` | One total per service. |

🟩 `200` response body:

<sub>Content-Type</sub> `application/json`

Type: array<[CostRollup](#schema-costrollup)>

</details>
